channel.title: InYourBones Daily Music News
channel.description: Top 5 daily music stories handpicked by InYourBones

item.title: Ms. Lauryn Hill to Perform Rare Acoustic Shows This Summer
item.description: 🎵 Get ready for an intimate experience with Ms. Lauryn Hill this summer! 🌞 Acoustic vibes coming your way! 🎶 #LaurynHill #AcousticSessions

item.title: Stevie Wonder Delivers Show-Stopping Finale Performance at Obama Center Opening
item.description: Stevie Wonder blows minds at Obama Center opening with epic finale performance! 🎶🌟 #Legend #ObamaCenter #StevieWonder

item.title: Gizmo Announce Debut Album All Your Worships: Hear “Gift Shop”
item.description: 🎉 Dive into the infectious sounds of Gizmo's debut album "All Your Worships" with their latest single "Gift Shop"! 🎶✨ #NewMusicAlert

item.title: Craig Finn Announces The Man I’ve Always Been Tour
item.description: Ready to rock with Craig Finn on The Man I've Always Been Tour! 🤘 Dates dropping soon! #CraigFinn #MusicNews

item.title: Tierra Whack Calls Out Critics in New Singles ‘Totem’ and ‘Wax Paper’
item.description: 🔥 Tierra Whack brings the heat with bold new singles 'Totem' and 'Wax Paper'! Let's gooo! 🔥🎶 #TierraWhack #NewMusicDrop
